positive: A complex, symmetric mandala illustration featuring stylized celestial bodies, constellations, and mythical geometric flora. The design should utilize thick, clean continuous line art combined with negative space contrast. Colors are limited to deep cosmic indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, metallic gold accents, and matte white background. The composition must be highly centralized and contained within a circular frame, suitable for direct apparel printing. The style is Neo-Art Deco mixed with sacred geometry, rendered with immaculate crisp lines and dramatic contrast, evoking a feeling of mystical wonder and cosmic elegance. Vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, smudge, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealistic, painting, oil paint, 3d render
